# GEDCOM Test Files

This directory contains GEDCOM test files for testing the import functionality.

## Directory Structure

- `5.5.1/` - GEDCOM 5.5.1 format test files
- `7.0/` - GEDCOM 7.0 format test files

## Adding Test Files

Place your `.ged` test files in the appropriate version directory:

- For GEDCOM 5.5.1 files → `5.5.1/`
- For GEDCOM 7.0 files → `7.0/`

## Recommended Test Files

Consider adding:
- Simple family trees (minimal test cases)
- Complex family trees (stress tests)
- Files with various event types
- Files with sources and citations
- Files with media references
- Files with place hierarchies
- Files from different genealogy software

## Sources for Test Files

- Official GEDCOM specs: https://gedcom.io/
- Test files repository: https://github.com/gedcom7code/test-files
- Sample files: https://github.com/findmypast/gedcom-samples
